author.name: ANCIENT_FORM: RACHEL LIM
author.subtitle: Software Developer // Designer
author.description: Discover the historical data fragments of Ancient Form: Rachel, a dual-class form, and uncover a way to restore balance to the nebula.

intro: SYSTEM_BOOTING...
WARNING: HIGH-DATA SIGNAL DETECTED IN RADIUS. IDENTIFYING SOURCE...
SOURCE IDENTIFIED: TAMAGO_CORE_4864
INITIALIZING MISSION BRIEFING...
Hello, Explorer 853...
You were chosen among the many to man TORTOISE.
Your mission is to navigate the digital nebula and FIND Tamago.

In the vastness of the internet space, there has been a phenomenon that caused data fragments to scatter across the sectors. We have not been able to uncover the cause. Our only hope is to find out about the ancient forms that may hold the key to restoring balance.

Tamago was our first prototype under Project RESTORE, sent on a mission to explore the nebula, 10111001, and retrieve data from high-density signal clusters that contains information on one of our Subjects of Interest (SOI), Ancient Form: Rachel.

Tamago's last known coordinates were in the vicinity of Base 16, the central hub of nebula, 10111001, before we lost connection. We have reason to believe that Tamago may have encounterd a burst of high-density data that may have caused a system failure and resulted in the loss of communication.
But recently, our researchers have detected faint signals from Tamago's data core 4864, suggesting that it may have survived and collected valuable data fragments from the nebula.
Your task is to locate Tamago and retrieve the data fragments it has collected, allowing us to study the ancient forms, bringing us closer to restoring balance.
MISSION BRIEFING COMPLETE.
DOWNLOADING TAMAGO_CORE_4864 DATA FRAGMENTS...
DOWNLOAD COMPLETE.
BOOTING TAMAGO_CORE_4864...
TAMAGO_CORE_4864 BOOTED SUCCESSFULLY.
SCRAMBLING...Welcome to Tamago OS! Choose your navigation partner.
Welcome! I've been waiting for you.
I'll be your guide through Tamago's data core, where I have created a LORE from the data fragments I've collected!
I'll stay down here in the corner. Scroll down to explore!
home.guide: We've arrived at the central hub, the DECK. From here, you can access the lore from Ancient Form: Rachel.
home.lore: Based on the fragments I've collected, Ancient Form: Rachel was a dual-class form. I wonder what that means...

projects.guide: This is the PROJECT_LOG . It contains the logs of the ancient form's past missions and engineered constructs.
projects.lore: Each project is a data fragment that holds a piece of the ancient form's story. By analyzing these fragments, we can uncover the skills and experiences that shaped her journey.

skills.guide: Behold the SKILL_TREE. Here I've logged the skills of the ancient form. I wonder if I have enough data fragments to unlock all the skills...
skills.lore: Skills are the building blocks of any form. They define their capabilities and potential. By studying the skill tree, we can gain insights into the ancient form's strengths and weaknesses.

contact.guide: This is the CONTECT_NODE. I was able to log the contact information, but Tamago's communication system is broken...if only we can find a communation module to send a ping...
contact.lore: WAIT! What if we can use TORTOISE to send a ping to the contact information? Maybe we can establish communication and reach out to the ancient form.

glitchNarrative.discovery: WARNING: DATA COLLISION DETECTED. A FRACTURED NEBULA IS FORMING...
glitchNarrative.techSummary: The Sector of Logic. Here, Ancient Form: Rachel engineered solutions using AI, Full-Stack Architecture, and MedTech protocols. Every line of code is a structural beam.
glitchNarrative.artSummary: The Nebula of Expression. A hidden layer of data fragments revealing expertise in Web Design, Photography, and Graphic Arts. Here, the laws of the machine are mere suggestions.
glitchNarrative.dualClass: IDENTIFIED: DUAL-CLASS FORM. Logic and Expression in perfect, albeit unstable, balance.

narrative.tech_path: You've entered the Sector of Logic. Every pixel here obeys the laws of the machine.
narrative.art_path: You've drifted into the Nebula of Expression. Here, rules are merely suggestions.
narrative.contact: CONNECTING TO TORTOISE...CONNECTION ESTABLISHED. READY TO SEND PING.

about.title: The Lore
paragraphs: Hailing from the Philippines, Ancient Form: Rachel, studied Computer Science from the University of London, where she gained the skills of coding.
But early on, she developed a passion for design and creativity, leading her to pursue a dual path in both Tech and Art... a dual-class form!

She engineered solutions in FinTech and MedTech--something about an internship in Taiwan, I forget hehe--, wielding code to solve complex problems. Her projects showed evidence that she has the Full-Stack Development skill set. She also crafted visual narratives through design and illustration. And she seemed to have designed projects involving Artificial Intelligence... I wonder if she has any experience in Machine Learning or Data Science? I hope we can find more data fragments to uncover more about her story...

Let's explore Tamago's data core to find out more about Ancient Form: Rachel and her journey! And if we could just find out a way to reach her, then maybe, just maybe, we can restore balance to the nebula...
